zh.lifeSummary: 當Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd於1376年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Dafydd ap Iorwerth52歲，母親Mallt ferch Madog47歲。他於從1407年到1439年與Eva verch Meredydd結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1415年10月25日在威爾士安格萊波多爾根享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd于1376年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Dafydd ap Iorwerth52岁，母亲Mallt ferch Madog47岁。他于从1407年到1439年与Eva verch Meredydd结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1415年10月25日在威尔士安格萊波多爾根享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Sais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Saxon"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Estonian Suurhans ‘big Hans’ (see Hans ).

variants.name: Saxton
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from a place in Cambridgeshire. The place name derives from the genitive case of the Old Norse byname Kakkr (apparently a derivative of kokkr ‘lump’) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. The surname is well known, as it was borne by William Caxton ( ?1422–91 ), who established the first printing press in England, but the reason for its recent adoption as a given name is not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd was born in 1376, in Wales, his father, Dafydd ap Iorwerth, was 52 and his mother, Mallt ferch Madog, was 47. He married Eva verch Meredydd from 1407 to 1439. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 25 October 1415, in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd est né en 1376, à Galles, son père, Dafydd ap Iorwerth, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Mallt ferch Madog, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Eva verch Meredydd du 1407 au 1439. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1415, à Bodorgan, Anglesey, Galles, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd 1376 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dafydd ap Iorwerth 52 und seine Mutter Mallt ferch Madog 47. Er hat von 1407 bis 1439 Eva verch Meredydd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd è nato il nel 1376 nel Galles, il suo padre, Dafydd ap Iorwerth, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Mallt ferch Madog, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Eva verch Meredydd da 1407 a 1439. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 25 ottobre 1415, nel Bodorgan, Anglesey, Galles, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davyddが1376年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Dafydd ap Iorwerthは52歳，母Mallt ferch Madogは47歳であった。から1407年まで1439年にEva verch Meredyddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1415年10月25日にウェールズアングレセイボドルガンで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd(이)가 1376년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dafydd ap Iorwerth(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Mallt ferch Madog(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1407년 부터 1439년 까지 Eva verch Meredydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 25일 웨일스 앤글레시 보도르건에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd nasceu em 1376, em Gales, seu pai, Dafydd ap Iorwerth, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Mallt ferch Madog, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva verch Meredydd de 1407 a 1439. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1415, em Bodorgan, Anglesey, Gales, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Einion Sais "The Saxon" ap Davydd родился в 1376 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Dafydd ap Iorwerth было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Mallt ferch Madog, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva verch Meredydd с 1407 по 1439. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 25 октября 1415 г. в местности бодорган, англеси, Уэльс в возрасте 39 лет.

Se casó con Eva verch Meredydd desde 1407 hasta 1439. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1415, en Bodorgan, Isla Oscura, Gales, a la edad de 39 años.
